creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
This is the port for wmstock 0.06. Thanks go to the author, Matt Fischer
<mfischer@umr.edu> for working with me on getting this program to work
on FreeBSD. We shared quite a bit of email, to say the least.

If you're an avid investor and use Window Maker for your windowmanager,
you may find this program very useful.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar below to create the port.
